g.text: Locate O-ring in front recess of diffuser/cover plate.
Item 28 Bolt - Base Plate 3/8 BSW x 3/4 LG is available from your Local Hardware Store
Base NLA, refer to part 12078 as replacement motor support.
-0 Pumps have a Drip Proof Motor, -1 Pumps have a TEFC Motor, -2 Pumps have a 5/8 type 6 Seal Arrangement.
Shallow Well Pressure Pumps w Torrium
Models with a Torrium utilise the same spare parts as -2 non Torrium models.
